headline: Jim Cramer Believes Eli Lilly’s “Weight Loss Pill Will Be a Blockbuster”
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) is among the stocks in focus, as Jim Cramer analyzed the broader market impact of the recent AI data center rally. Cramer highlighted the FDA approval of the company’s new weight loss pill and its acquisition of Centessa Pharmaceuticals, as he stated: Today, we got big news from Eli Lilly. […]

headline: Eli Lilly's One-Two Punch Could Knock Novo Nordisk Out of the Obesity Drug Fight
summary: The U.S. Food & Drug Administration just approved Eli Lilly's GLP-1 pill orforglipron.

headline: Why Eli Lilly (LLY) Is Up 6.5% After FDA Approval of Foundayo Oral Obesity Pill
summary: In early April 2026, Eli Lilly received U.S. FDA approval for Foundayo (orforglipron), a once‑daily oral GLP‑1 pill for adults with obesity or overweight and weight‑related medical problems, with U.S. availability beginning via LillyDirect and pharmacies from April 6. Beyond adding a needle‑free obesity option, Foundayo’s strong ATTAIN trial data and broad planned filings in over 40 countries could materially deepen Lilly’s role in global cardiometabolic care. We’ll now examine how...
